pr.title: Legal TTT (SGD, 3-epoch) + SLOT (lr=0.003, steps=5) on PR #549 base -- val_bpb: 1.11512 (3-seed mean, beats merged SOTA 1.1194)

output.summary: Adds Legal TTT plus SLOT per-batch residual deltas optimized through the final logits layer atop the PR #549 Parallel Muon baseline.
techniques: Legal TTT + SLOT residual delta adaptation during evaluation
Optimizes logits-only delta via five AdamW steps per batch
Keeps PR #549 GQA/LeakyReLU Parallel Muon backbone unchanged
